body:
**Uberon term**
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/UBERON_0009834

**Bug description**
This is not necessarily a bug - just a question at this point - but there wasn't another category of new issue to choose. I notice that 'dorsolateral prefrontal cortex' http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/UBERON_0009834 is a sibling of 'prefrontal cortex' http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/UBERON_0000451 but it seems to me that it should be a part_of child of it instead.

Best,
Michelle

This term question arose as part of work on the SCORCH Project (Single Cell Opioid Response in the Context of HIV).

comments.body: Looping in @JPReceveur who works on this project too.

This is consistent with the Allen Brain Atlas, which I think should be our source of truth for this. http://atlas.brain-map.org/atlas?atlas=138322603#structure=10172 @dragon-ai-agent - please change the part relationship from 'dorsolateral prefrontal cortex' to 'cerebral cortex' to a part relationship to 'prefrontal cortex'.
@dragon-ai-agent please change the part relationship on 'dorsolateral prefrontal cortex' from 'cererbral cortex' to 'prefrontal cortex'
(Note - previous agent invocation failed - probably due to additional '-' before the please?)

title: question on parentage of 'dorsolateral prefrontal cortex'
